title: P0 full benchmark regression suite
purpose: Collect all shipped P0 hardening benchmark families into one repeatable regression gate without turning benchmarking into a new product layer or dashboard platform.
update_policy: Only update this suite when a shipped hardening category is added, removed, or materially re-scoped.
Keep gate modes explicit: required categories can fail the suite, advisory categories can warn without blocking.
Prefer revising category manifests over creating parallel suite definitions unless the product baseline genuinely forks.

categories.title: Domain / Functional pack contracts
categories.purpose: Protect the 8 domain pack contracts and their runtime selection baseline.

categories.title: Industry Batch 1
categories.purpose: Protect the first 6 industry pack contracts and their runtime selection baseline.

categories.title: Industry Batch 2
categories.purpose: Protect the second 5 industry pack contracts and their runtime selection baseline.

categories.title: Legal / finance contract-aware cases
categories.purpose: Protect contract-aware pack framing and clause / obligation support-bundle baselines.

categories.title: Operations / process-aware cases
categories.purpose: Protect process-aware pack framing and process issue support-bundle baselines.

categories.title: Deliverable hardening
categories.purpose: Track bundle density, ranking, and artifact-readiness regressions while keeping display-discipline checks advisory.

categories.title: Ingestion hardening
categories.purpose: Protect support-boundary honesty, limited extract handling, and reference-only fallback semantics.
